rationale: The citing paper uses Janiszewski and Chandon (2007) in a grouped citation as an example of prior laboratory mere measurement work with low-priced, frequently purchased items (ice cream). The citation helps provide broad background contrast for why the current paper uses field experiments, but it is not tied to specific hypotheses, mechanisms, measures, or methods in this study. Because the role is contextual and non-distinct, this is a passing literature mention rather than a substantive directional dependency.
